scripts.build: npx tsc -p packages/engine/tsconfig.json && node packages/vscode-ext/esbuild.js && node packages/desktop/esbuild.js
scripts.build:prod: npx tsc -p packages/engine/tsconfig.json && node packages/vscode-ext/esbuild.js --production && node packages/desktop/esbuild.js --production
scripts.package:mac: npm run build:desktop && npm run icon:mac && cd packages/desktop && npx electron-builder --mac
scripts.package:win: npm run build:desktop && npm run icon && cd packages/desktop && npx electron-builder --win
scripts.typecheck: npx tsc --build packages/engine && npx tsc -p packages/vscode-ext/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p packages/desktop/tsconfig.json --noEmit
